title: pi-context has no global command form — the built bin carries no exec bit
description: packages/pi-context-cli declares bin pi-context -> dist/bin.js with a node shebang, but its build (rm -rf dist && tsc) never sets the exec bit on dist/bin.js, leaving it -rw-r--r--. npm link and npm i -g cannot expose pi-context on PATH from a non-executable entry.

evidence.reference: build is 'rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json' — no chmod +x dist/bin.js step
built bin is -rw-r--r-- (no exec bit); shebang present

impact: pi-context is invokable only as `node packages/pi-context-cli/dist/bin.js` from the repo; there is no PATH `pi-context` command for users, and pi-context --pi-bound (FEAT-005) has no global entrypoint.
proposed_resolution: Add a chmod +x dist/bin.js step to the pi-context-cli build so npm link and npm i -g expose an executable pi-context on PATH; the published artifact carries the bit unconditionally.
